controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-operative financial holding company) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Operative
Financial Holding Company) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-operative financial holding company) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to every non-operative financial holding company (nofhc) as defined in these directions
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall apply to every Non-Operative Financial Holding Company
(NOFHC) as defined in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to every non-operative financial holding company (nofhc) as defined in these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'consolidated capital funds' means the capital, reserves and surplus of the nofhc determined on the cons
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms used herein
shall bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Consolidated capital funds' means the Capital, Reserves and Surplus of the
NOFHC determined on the consolidation of its subsidiaries, associates and joint
ventures in accordance with the applicable Accounting Standards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'consolidated capital funds' means the capital, reserves and surplus of the nofhc determined on the cons

controls.control_objective: To ensure a non-deposit taking nbfc, which holds the shares of a banking company and the shares of all other financial services companies in its group, whether
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Non-Operative Financial Holding Company (NOFHC)' means a non-deposit
taking NBFC, which holds the shares of a banking company and the shares of
all other financial services companies in its group, whether regulated by the
Reserve Bank or by any other financial regulator, to the extent permissible
under the applicable regulatory prescriptions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a non-deposit taking nbfc, which holds the shares of a banking company and the shares of all other financial services companies in its group, whether

controls.control_objective: To ensure the person who together with his relatives [as defined in section 2 (77) of the companies act, 2013 and rules made there under], by virtue of his ownership of voting equity shares, will be/ is in effective control of the bank / nofhc, and includes
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Promoter' means the person who together with his relatives [as defined in
Section 2 (77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and Rules made there under], by
virtue of his ownership of voting equity shares, will be/ is in effective control of
the bank / NOFHC, and includes, wherever applicable, all entities which form
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the person who together with his relatives [as defined in section 2 (77) of the companies act, 2013 and rules made there under], by virtue of his ownership of voting equity shares, will be/ is in effective control of the bank / nofhc, and includes

controls.control_objective: To ensure any arrangement whether in the form of shareholding or agreement or otherwise, which enables exercise of control
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The term 'effective control' means any arrangement whether in the
form of shareholding or agreement or otherwise, which enables exercise of
control.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any arrangement whether in the form of shareholding or agreement or otherwise, which enables exercise of control

controls.control_objective: To ensure be registered with rbi as a non-banking financial company (nbfc)
controls.control_description:
The NOFHC shall be registered with RBI as a non-banking financial company
(NBFC).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be registered with rbi as a non-banking financial company (nbfc)

controls.control_objective: To ensure first have received an in- principle approval for setting up a bank from the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
A company seeking registration as an NOFHC shall first have received an in-
principle approval for setting up a bank from the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to first have received an in- principle approval for setting up a bank from the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made with the requisite information and documents through pravaah portal to department of regulation, reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
The application for
registration of NOFHC shall be made with the requisite information and documents
through PRAVAAH portal to Department of Regulation, Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made with the requisite information and documents through pravaah portal to department of regulation, reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be owned by the promoter / promoter group
controls.control_description:
Not less than 51 per cent of the total paid-up equity capital of the NOFHC shall be
owned by the Promoter / Promoter Group.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be owned by the promoter / promoter group

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold the bank as well as all the other financial services entities of the group regulated by rbi or other financial sector regulators
controls.control_description:
The NOFHC shall hold the bank as well as all the other financial services entities of
the Group regulated by RBI or other financial sector regulators.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold the bank as well as all the other financial services entities of the group regulated by rbi or other financial sector regulators

controls.control_objective: To ensure ring fence the regulated financial services entities of the group, including the bank, from other activities of the group i
controls.control_description:
The objective is that
the Holding Company should ring fence the regulated financial services entities of the
Group, including the bank, from other activities of the Group i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ring fence the regulated financial services entities of the group, including the bank, from other activities of the group i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ring fenced from other regulated financial activities of the group
controls.control_description:
commercial, and
financial activities not regulated by financial sector regulators and also that the bank
should be ring fenced from other regulated financial activities of the Group.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ring fenced from other regulated financial activities of the group

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as under: (1) the shareholding of the promoter / promoter group in the nofhc shall be only through individuals, non-financial services entities and
controls.control_description:
The capital structure of the NOFHC set up by Promoter / Promoter Group shall be
as under:
(1) The shareholding of the Promoter / Promoter Group in the NOFHC shall be only
through individuals, non-financial services entities and Core Investment
Companies in the Group.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under: (1) the shareholding of the promoter / promoter group in the nofhc shall be only through individuals, non-financial services entities and

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to be a shareholder in the nofhc
controls.control_description:
Consequently, no financial services entity in the
promoter group, other than those specified above, shall be eligible to be a
shareholder in the NOFHC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to be a shareholder in the nofhc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be held by promoter/s / companies forming part of the promoter group
controls.control_description:
(2) Not less than 51 per cent of the total voting equity shares of the NOFHC shall be
held by promoter/s / companies forming part of the Promoter Group.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be held by promoter/s / companies forming part of the promoter group

controls.control_objective: To ensure preferably have a diversified shareholding
controls.control_description:
In case the
shareholding is by companies of the promoter group, such companies shall
preferably have a diversified shareholding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to preferably have a diversified shareholding

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 15 per cent of the total paid-up equity capital of the nofhc per such individual
controls.control_description:
(3)In case 51 per cent or more of promoter group shareholding in the NOFHC is held
by individuals belonging to the Promoter Group, shareholding by each of such
individual, along with his relatives [as defined in Section 2 (77) of the Companies
Act, 2013 and Rules made there under] and along with entities in which he and /
or his relatives hold 50 per cent or more of the voting equity shares, shall not
exceed 15 per cent of the total paid-up equity capital of the NOFHC per such
individual.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 15 per cent of the total paid-up equity capital of the nofhc per such individual

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than 10 per cent of the total shareholding of the nofhc
controls.control_description:
However, shareholding by a single
individual, who is not a promoter, along with his relatives [as defined in Section 2
(77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and Rules made there under] and along with
entities in which he and / or his relatives hold 50 per cent or more of the voting
equity shares, shall not be more than 10 per cent of the total shareholding of the
NOFHC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than 10 per cent of the total shareholding of the nofhc

controls.control_objective: To ensure have significant influence and control in the nofhc
controls.control_description:
(4) No shareholder, other than the promoters / promoter group, shall have significant
influence and control in the NOFHC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have significant influence and control in the nofhc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to rbi
controls.control_description:
Any change in shareholding within the NOFHC, as a result of which a shareholder
transfers / acquires five per cent or more of its total equity capital, from the date of
grant of in-principle approval, shall be reported to RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold equity investment in the bank and other regulated financial entities in the group only through the nofhc
controls.control_description:
The Promoters / Promoter Group entities / individuals associated with Promoter
Group shall hold equity investment in the bank and other regulated financial entities in
the group only through the NOFHC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold equity investment in the bank and other regulated financial entities in the group only through the nofhc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for the purpose of calculation of promoter shareholding in the nofhc/ bank
controls.control_description:
Non-voting capital shall not be reckoned for the purpose of calculation of promoter
shareholding in the NOFHC/ bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for the purpose of calculation of promoter shareholding in the nofhc/ bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the corporate governance guidelines as issued by rbi from time to time
controls.control_description:
The NOFHC should comply with the corporate governance guidelines as issued
by RBI from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to comply with the corporate governance guidelines as issued by rbi from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure include the following: (1) no nofhc shall have as a director in its board of directors, any person who is a director in any other nofhc or a bank othe
controls.control_description:
Such guidelines shall include the following:
(1) No NOFHC shall have as a Director in its Board of Directors, any person who
is a Director in any other NOFHC or a bank other than a banking company
under it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include the following: (1) no nofhc shall have as a director in its board of directors, any person who is a director in any other nofhc or a bank othe

controls.control_objective: To ensure be managed by any person- explanation: major customers and major suppliers of the promoter group would mean dealings with whom constitute 10 per cent
controls.control_description:
(2) No NOFHC shall be managed by any person-
Explanation: Major customers and major suppliers of the promoter group would
mean dealings with whom constitute 10 per cent or more of the annual
purchases or sales or both taken together.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be managed by any person- explanation: major customers and major suppliers of the promoter group would mean dealings with whom constitute 10 per cent

controls.control_objective: To ensure a director of the nofhc being also a director on the board of the bank held by it cannot be considered as independent director of the bank
controls.control_description:
Provided that a director of the NOFHC being also a director on the Board of the
bank held by it cannot be considered as independent director of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a director of the nofhc being also a director on the board of the bank held by it cannot be considered as independent director of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure have special knowledge or practical experience in respect of one or more of the following matters, namely
controls.control_description:
(5) The Independent Directors referred to above shall have special knowledge or
practical experience in respect of one or more of the following matters, namely,
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have special knowledge or practical experience in respect of one or more of the following matters, namely

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with such soundness standards in terms of corporate governance including 'fit and proper' criteria, as applicable to banks, as contained in res
controls.control_description:
(3) NOFHC shall comply with such soundness standards in terms of corporate
governance including 'fit and proper' criteria, as applicable to banks, as
contained in Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Governance)
Directions, 2025, to the extent appropriate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with such soundness standards in terms of corporate governance including 'fit and proper' criteria, as applicable to banks, as contained in res

controls.control_objective: To ensure be totally independent of the promoter or promoter group entities and their major customers and major suppliers
controls.control_description:
(4) At least 50 per cent of the Directors of NOFHC shall be totally independent of
the Promoter or Promoter Group entities and their major customers and major
suppliers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be totally independent of the promoter or promoter group entities and their major customers and major suppliers

controls.control_objective: To ensure debt mutual funds are not covered under money market instruments
controls.control_description: Provided that Debt mutual funds are not covered under money market instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to debt mutual funds are not covered under money market instruments

controls.control_objective: To ensure create a reserve fund and shall, out of the balance of profit each year as disclosed in the profit and loss account and before any dividend is declare
controls.control_description:
The NOFHC shall create a reserve fund and shall, out of the balance of profit each
year as disclosed in the profit and loss account and before any dividend is declared,
transfer to the reserve fund a sum equivalent to not less than 25 per cent of such profit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to create a reserve fund and shall, out of the balance of profit each year as disclosed in the profit and loss account and before any dividend is declare

controls.control_objective: To ensure be payable only out of the profits and further subject to meeting the following conditions: (1) compliance with all prudential norms prescribed for th
controls.control_description:
Any dividend proposed to be paid by the NOFHC to its shareholders shall be
payable only out of the profits and further subject to meeting the following conditions:
(1) Compliance with all prudential norms prescribed for the NOFHC both on stand-
alone as well as consolidated level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be payable only out of the profits and further subject to meeting the following conditions: (1) compliance with all prudential norms prescribed for th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be free of any qualifications by the statutory auditors, which have an adverse bearing on the profit during that year
controls.control_description:
(3) The financial statements of the NOFHC both on stand-alone and consolidated
level shall be free of any qualifications by the statutory auditors, which have an
adverse bearing on the profit during that year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be free of any qualifications by the statutory auditors, which have an adverse bearing on the profit during that year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be suitably adjusted while computing the dividend payout ratio
controls.control_description:
In case of any qualification to that
effect, the net profit should be suitably adjusted while computing the dividend
payout ratio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be suitably adjusted while computing the dividend payout ratio

controls.control_objective: To ensure closely monitor its liquidity position and interest rate risk
controls.control_description: The NOFHC shall closely monitor its liquidity position and interest rate risk.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to closely monitor its liquidity position and interest rate risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare a structural liquidity statement (sls) and interest rate sensitivity statement (irs) as specified under reserve bank of india (commercial bank
controls.control_description:
For
this purpose, the NOFHC shall prepare a structural liquidity statement (SLS) and
interest rate sensitivity statement (IRS) as specified under Reserve Bank of India
(Commercial Banks - Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare a structural liquidity statement (sls) and interest rate sensitivity statement (irs) as specified under reserve bank of india (commercial bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a leverage up to 1
controls.control_description:
The NOFHC may have a leverage up to 1.25 times of its paid-up equity capital and
free reserves.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a leverage up to 1

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the ability of the nofhc to service its borrowings from its dividend income
controls.control_description:
The actual leverage assumed within this limit should be based on the
ability of the NOFHC to service its borrowings from its dividend income.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on the ability of the nofhc to service its borrowings from its dividend income

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain capital adequacy and other requirements on a consolidated basis based on the prudential guidelines specified under reserve bank of india (com
controls.control_description:
NOFHC shall maintain capital adequacy and other requirements on a consolidated
basis based on the prudential guidelines specified under Reserve Bank of India
(Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to maintain capital adequacy and other requirements on a consolidated basis based on the prudential guidelines specified under reserve bank of india (com

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare consolidated financial statements in terms of the instructions contained in reserve bank of india (commercial banks - financial statements: pr
controls.control_description:
The NOFHC shall prepare consolidated financial statements in terms of the
instructions contained in Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Financial
Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare consolidated financial statements in terms of the instructions contained in reserve bank of india (commercial banks - financial statements: pr

controls.control_objective: To ensure also compute consolidated capital adequacy ratio as indicated under reserve bank of india (commercial banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) di
controls.control_description:
The NOFHC shall also
compute consolidated capital adequacy ratio as indicated under Reserve Bank of India
(Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also compute consolidated capital adequacy ratio as indicated under reserve bank of india (commercial banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) di

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the instructions on disclosure in reserve bank of india (commercial banks - financial statements: presentation and disclosures) directions
controls.control_description:
The consolidated NOFHC shall adhere to the instructions on disclosure in Reserve
Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Financial Statements: Presentation and
Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the instructions on disclosure in reserve bank of india (commercial banks - financial statements: presentation and disclosures) directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare a structural liquidity statement (sls), interest rate sensitivity statement (irs) as specified under reserve bank of india (commercial banks -
controls.control_description:
The consolidated NOFHC shall prepare a structural liquidity statement (SLS),
interest rate sensitivity statement (IRS) as specified under Reserve Bank of India
(Commercial Banks - Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare a structural liquidity statement (sls), interest rate sensitivity statement (irs) as specified under reserve bank of india (commercial banks -

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any credit and investment (including investment in equity / debt capital instrument) exposure to any entity belonging to the promoter group excep
controls.control_description:
NOFHC shall not have any credit and investment (including investment in equity /
debt capital instrument) exposure to any entity belonging to the Promoter Group
except those held under it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any credit and investment (including investment in equity / debt capital instrument) exposure to any entity belonging to the promoter group excep

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any equity, debt capital and credit exposure to any entity outside the group including other nofhcs or other banks, financial and non-financial e
controls.control_description:
NOFHC shall not have any equity, debt capital and credit exposure to any entity
outside the Group including other NOFHCs or other banks, financial and non-financial
entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any equity, debt capital and credit exposure to any entity outside the group including other nofhcs or other banks, financial and non-financial e

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to all the exposure norms (as per reserve bank of india (commercial banks -concentration risk management) directions, 2025), on the consolidate
controls.control_description:
The consolidated NOFHC shall adhere to all the exposure norms (as per Reserve
Bank of India (Commercial Banks -Concentration Risk Management) Directions,
2025), on the consolidated basis such as large exposure framework, capital market
exposure limit etc, as applicable to groups.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to all the exposure norms (as per reserve bank of india (commercial banks -concentration risk management) directions, 2025), on the consolidate

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 10 per cent of its consolidated capital funds
controls.control_description:
The consolidated NOFHC's investments in the capital instruments issued by
banking, financial and insurance entities outside its Group together with the
unconsolidated financial and insurance entities within the Group should not exceed 10
per cent of its consolidated capital funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 10 per cent of its consolidated capital funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure entities which are outside of the scope of regulatory consolidation
controls.control_description:
Explanation: Unconsolidated means entities which are outside of the scope of
regulatory consolidation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to entities which are outside of the scope of regulatory consolidation

controls.control_objective: To ensure the consolidated regulatory capital of the nofhc under the regulatory scope of consolidation as per reserve bank of india (commercial banks - prudenti
controls.control_description:
Consolidated capital funds for regulatory purpose means the consolidated regulatory
capital of the NOFHC under the regulatory scope of consolidation as per Reserve
Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy)
Directions, 2025 and Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Financial
Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the consolidated regulatory capital of the nofhc under the regulatory scope of consolidation as per reserve bank of india (commercial banks - prudenti

controls.control_objective: To ensure invest in the equity / debt capital instruments of any financial entities under the nofhc
controls.control_description:
The bank shall not invest in the equity / debt capital instruments of any financial
entities under the NOFHC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invest in the equity / debt capital instruments of any financial entities under the nofhc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the extant cross holding norms as per reserve bank of india (commercial banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
The bank's investments in equity / debt capital instruments of other banks /
financial institutions including other NOFHCs shall be guided by the extant cross
holding norms as per Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms
on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the extant cross holding norms as per reserve bank of india (commercial banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 20 per cent of the bank's paid-up share capital and reserves
controls.control_description:
Investment in equity by the bank in the entities engaged in financial and non-
financial activities, outside the Promoter Group would be subject to a limit of 10 per
cent of the investee entity's paid-up share capital or 10 per cent of the bank's paid-up
share capital and reserves, whichever is less, and the aggregate of all such
investments should not exceed 20 per cent of the bank's paid-up share capital and
reserves.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 20 per cent of the bank's paid-up share capital and reserves

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any credit and investments (including investments in the equity/debt capital instruments) exposure to the promoters / promoter group entities or
controls.control_description:
The financial entities held by the NOFHC shall adhere to the following overarching
principles in order to avoid round tripping of funds and to avoid circular movement of
funds in the banking group, such as:
(1) The financial entities held by NOFHC shall not have any credit and investments
(including investments in the equity/debt capital instruments) exposure to the
Promoters / Promoter Group entities or individuals associated with the Promoter
Group or the NOFHC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any credit and investments (including investments in the equity/debt capital instruments) exposure to the promoters / promoter group entities or

controls.control_objective: To ensure make investment in the equity / debt capital instruments amongst themselves
controls.control_description:
(2) The financial entities held by NOFHC shall not make investment in the equity /
debt capital instruments amongst themselves.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make investment in the equity / debt capital instruments amongst themselves

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to set up any new financial services entity for at least three years from the date of commencement of business of the nofhc
controls.control_description:
Apart from setting up the bank, the NOFHC shall not be permitted to set up any
new financial services entity for at least three years from the date of commencement
of business of the NOFHC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to set up any new financial services entity for at least three years from the date of commencement of business of the nofhc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carried out from the bank
controls.control_description:
1The general principle for reorganization of the activities in the group is that all
activities permitted to a bank under Section 6 (1) (a) to (o) of Banking Regulation Act,
1949 shall be carried out from the bank
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carried out from the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carried out only through subsidiary/joint venture/associate structure
controls.control_description:
2However, specialized activities such as Mutual fund business, insurance
business, pension fund management, investment advisory and management services,
portfolio management services and broking services shall be carried out only through
Subsidiary/Joint venture/Associate structure;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carried out only through subsidiary/joint venture/associate structure

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval of the reserve bank for the entities held by it to undertake activities mentioned under paragraph 45 above
controls.control_description:
3An NOFHC shall not require prior approval of the Reserve Bank for the entities
held by it to undertake activities mentioned under paragraph 45 above, unless advised
otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval of the reserve bank for the entities held by it to undertake activities mentioned under paragraph 45 above

controls.control_objective: To ensure intimate the reserve bank within 15 days from the date of resolution of the board for undertaking such businesses
controls.control_description:
However, the NOFHC shall intimate the Reserve Bank within 15 days from
the date of resolution of the Board for undertaking such businesses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to intimate the reserve bank within 15 days from the date of resolution of the board for undertaking such businesses

controls.control_objective: To ensure require the prior approval of the reserve bank for the entities held by it to undertake any other form of business subject to other instructions as ap
controls.control_description:
4Notwithstanding the conditions above, an NOFHC shall require the prior approval
of the Reserve Bank for the entities held by it to undertake any other form of business
subject to other instructions as applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require the prior approval of the reserve bank for the entities held by it to undertake any other form of business subject to other instructions as ap

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable
controls.control_description:
If the non-operative holding
company is a CIC or other NBFC, the relevant directions shall be applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure information relevant for this purpose, smoothly and promptly
controls.control_description:
RBI will have to be satisfied that the corporate structure does not impede the
financial services entities held by the NOFHC from being ring fenced, that it would be
able to supervise the bank, the NOFHC, and its Subsidiaries / Joint Ventures /
Associates on a consolidated basis, and that, it will be able to obtain all required
information relevant for this purpose, smoothly and promptly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to information relevant for this purpose, smoothly and promptly

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions,
instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall
continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect:
controls.control_description:
Further,
the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any
such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or
enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those
directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
<image>
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
